overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player navigates busy streets, crosses intersections, and explores narrow alleys with distinctive cyberpunk aesthetics including neon signs, holographic billboards, and eclectic architecture mixing old brick with futuristic elements.

events.description: begin crossing the street through marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through crosswalk with other pedestrians in a group

entered.detail: futuristic elevated transit track curving overhead with support pillars
large digital billboard displaying purple and pink holographic advertisements
tall brown brick building with multiple windows and air conditioning units
modern glass skyscraper visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic downtown, walking through a busy intersection with other pedestrians. Elevated monorail tracks curve overhead while holographic billboards glow on building facades. The camera moves steadily through the crosswalk toward the opposite corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with traffic and storefronts

events.description: waiting at corner as cars pass through the intersection
resuming walk and crossing the remaining street section

agents.ego_description: pausing at the street corner to let traffic pass before continuing

notable_agents.action: brown sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights and pedestrian signals
concrete building corner with yellow trim and large ground-floor windows
large advertisement billboard on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a street corner waiting for traffic, watching cars pass through the intersection. The scene features a concrete building with yellow trim on the right and traffic infrastructure. After vehicles clear, the camera continues across the street onto the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching enclosed market area with distinctive landmarks

events.description: approaching the giant noodle bowl landmark and food stand area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the distinctive noodle stand landmark

notable_agents.action: person in yellow pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large sculptural sign of a green bowl with noodles and chopsticks marking a food stand
bright blue vending machine with illuminated display
green painted elevated walkway or transit bridge crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a red-paved sidewalk toward a distinctive cyberpunk landmark - a giant noodle bowl sign marking a street food vendor. The environment features brick buildings with external air conditioning units, vending machines, and overhead transit infrastructure. The camera passes other pedestrians as it approaches the food stand area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti-covered walls and barriers

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings with restricted sky view
passing through graffiti-covered concrete barriers into narrower passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between buildings with graffiti art

entered.detail: large wall mural of a skull with text reading 'Por La Familia Vivo'
concrete blocks and barriers painted with red and white gang symbols
pink and white vending machine against the alley wall
chain link fence with barbed wire topping blocking the upper alley

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed service passage. The walls are covered in colorful graffiti murals including a prominent skull design. Concrete barriers with gang markings partially block the path, and the sky becomes mostly obscured by surrounding structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with neon signage and industrial elements

events.description: emerging into wider alley section with visible neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the alley passing the Brain Wash establishment with neon signage

entered.detail: purple and orange neon sign reading 'BRAIN WASH' above a storefront
large green industrial dumpsters and trash containers
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade visible at alley end

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the narrowest section of the alley into a slightly wider back street featuring the 'Brain Wash' neon sign glowing purple and orange. Industrial dumpsters line the path while modern glass towers are visible in the distance, contrasting with the gritty alley environment. The scene maintains the sheltered, mixed lighting of the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open futuristic intersection into the gritty, enclosed depths of a neon-lit urban alley. It begins by moving through a sunny downtown crosswalk beneath curving monorail tracks and glowing holographic billboards, pausing briefly at a street corner to watch traffic pass. As the camera continues across the street, the environment shifts toward a red-paved sidewalk lined with brick buildings and vending machines, leading toward a giant noodle bowl sign. The scene then narrows as the camera turns away from the open street and enters a service passage enclosed by tall walls covered in graffiti and concrete barriers. Finally, the path opens slightly into a back street where the purple and orange glow of a Brain Wash neon sign illuminates industrial dumpsters, contrasting the gritty foreground with distant glass towers.
